notableEvents.label: Brandon Lowe GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Lowe grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Lenyn Sosa. Spencer Horwitz out at 2nd. Brandon Lowe out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango grounds into a double play, first baseman Spencer Horwitz to shortstop Jared Triolo to pitcher Mitch Keller. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 2nd. Yohendrick Piñango out at 1st.
